verificationMethod: Valid University of Chicago ID
renewalNotes: Partner offers vary by organization and may change during the academic year.
name: UChicago ArtsPass
description: Free and discounted admission at arts and cultural organizations across Chicago using a valid UCID.
eligibility: Current University of Chicago students with a valid UCID
claimSteps: Review current ArtsPass partner offers.
Bring your valid UCID to the participating organization.
Follow the venue’s reservation instructions, if required.

verificationMethod: UCLA Logon ID and current undergraduate enrollment
renewalNotes: The pass must be renewed quarterly; summer access may require a fee.
name: Bruin U-Pass
description: Fare-free unlimited rides on participating Los Angeles County transit agencies during eligible academic quarters.
eligibility: Registered UCLA undergraduates paying the Universal Access Transit Pass Fee
claimSteps: Sign in to BruinTAP with your UCLA Logon ID.
Complete the required Metro survey.
Select Bruin U-Pass and obtain the required TAP card.
Renew the pass each eligible quarter.

verificationMethod: Valid Harvard ID
renewalNotes: Guest policies and museum hours vary; confirm with the individual museum.
name: Harvard Campus Museum Access
description: Free admission to Harvard campus museums with a valid Harvard ID, generally including one guest.
eligibility: Current Harvard students with a valid Harvard ID
claimSteps: Check the participating museum’s current hours.
Bring your valid Harvard ID.
Present the ID at admission and confirm the current guest policy.

verificationMethod: No verification required on standard Marguerite routes
renewalNotes: Routes and schedules vary on weekends and university holidays.
name: Marguerite Shuttle
description: Free shuttle service connecting Stanford campus, Palo Alto Transit Center, and nearby destinations.
eligibility: Open to Stanford students and the public
claimSteps: Review the current Marguerite route map and schedule.
Use the live map to locate the next shuttle.
Board the appropriate route; standard service is free.

verificationMethod: Valid MIT ID; some venues require advance reservations
renewalNotes: Participating institutions and ticket availability can change by season.
name: MIT Arts Access
description: Free admission to participating Boston art museums and subsidized performance tickets for current MIT students.
claimSteps: Choose a participating museum or performance.
Follow the venue-specific reservation instructions.
Present your valid MIT ID at entry.

verificationMethod: Valid Columbia University ID
renewalNotes: Participation and reservation requirements vary by museum.
name: Passport to Museums
description: Free admission to more than 20 participating New York City museums.
eligibility: Eligible Columbia students with a valid Columbia ID
claimSteps: Review the current Passport to Museums partners.
Check whether advance registration is required.
Present your valid Columbia ID at the museum.

verificationMethod: Valid PennCard
renewalNotes: Service boundaries, hours, and routes are subject to change.
name: Penn Transit
description: Free bus and shuttle transportation within the Penn Transit service area.
eligibility: Penn community members with a valid PennCard
claimSteps: Review current Penn Transit routes and service hours.
Use PennTransit Mobile to track buses or request an eligible shuttle.
Carry your valid PennCard when riding.

verificationMethod: Penn State account and current affiliation
renewalNotes: Licenses and available titles vary; access generally ends when university eligibility ends.
name: Penn State Software Access
description: Access to university-provided software and remote applications, including Adobe Creative Cloud and selected academic tools.
eligibility: Current Penn State students; product eligibility may vary by course or campus
claimSteps: Review the current Penn State software catalog.
Sign in with your Penn State account.
Confirm eligibility for the requested title.
Download the software or launch it through Penn State WebApps.
